title: Job Opening Category Manager at Just Herbs South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Just Herbs South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Just Herbs South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Kochi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Just Herbs South Asia Partners:
Just Herbs South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs South Asia Partners!
